arts.ttl: Fresh starts in Genoa vs Bologna
arts.sum: Genoa (60%, 3/5) and Bologna (43%, 3/7) are the two sides that have scored on percentage the most goals in the last 15 minutes of play in Serie A this season. Bologna have the same target: they have scored eight points in seven matches so far and do not want to let the leaders get away in order to chase a European qualification again this season.

arts.ttl: Bologna hit by Injury crisis as Italiano prepares for Genoa clash
arts.sum: Bologna manager Vincenzo Italiano faced the media today ahead of his team’s Serie A match against Genoa, revealing a mounting injury crisis that has hit the squad. The coach expressed his disappointment at losing several key players just as they returned from international duty. “Unfortunately, that’s how it is,” Italiano began. “We always talk about how during breaks we can work well, then when the internationals return they come back with some minutes in their legs. But this time we lose Aebischer, Ndoye, Iling and Erlic. Lucumi returned today and worked separately. We work one game at a time, we’ll The post Bologna hit by Injury crisis as Italiano prepares for Genoa clash appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Genoa manager Gilardino rallies team ahead of Bologna clash
arts.sum: As Serie A action resumes following the international break, Genoa manager Alberto Gilardino addressed the media to preview his side’s upcoming match against Bologna. The former Italian striker struck a defiant tone, emphasizing his belief in the squad despite recent struggles and a growing injury list. Gilardino began by praising the work ethic of the players who remained with the club during the break. “With the players I had available these two weeks, between those with national teams and those here, it has been weeks of excellent work and attitude from the boys. arts.ttl: Serie A | Genoa v Bologna: Match Preview
arts.sum: The Stadio Luigi Ferraris will host a pivotal match between two struggling Rossoblu sides this weekend as Genoa welcomes Bologna in a Serie A encounter that could have significant implications for both teams’ seasons. Genoa, under increasing pressure, find themselves in the relegation zone after a dismal run of form. Their recent 5-1 thrashing at the hands of Atalanta BC highlighted the team’s defensive frailties, having conceded a league-high 15 goals this season. Manager Alberto Gilardino faces mounting scrutiny, with his side having lost four of their last five league fixtures.
